# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: google-serviceentry
spec:
  hosts:
  - www.google.com
  addresses:
  - 74.125.190.68/32
  ports:
  - number: 443
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: google-virtualservice
spec:
  hosts:
  - www.google.com
  gateways:
  - mesh-external-gateway
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: www.google.com
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: google-destinationrule
spec:
  host: www.google.com
  subsets:
  - name: v1
    labels:
      version: v1
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: mesh-external-gateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: external-gateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 443
      protocol: HTTPS
    hosts:
    - www.google.com
